finding_results.notes: The opening now establishes a single Crook roster on-page: Thessa, Petra, Ruald, Denna, Kael, and Hale. The evacuation order keeps those same people in motion, and Thessa's casualty report plus Maren's accounting resolves the full alive/dead math without introducing stray names or uncertain survivors.

The bowl is framed as a carried habit-object rather than an active ritual instrument. Maren explicitly is not using it during practice, drops it because it is in the way before the nexus opening, cracks it incidentally under his knee, and leaves with it still only as a damaged possession. The fake-to-real bowl turn is no longer spent here.

Chapter 15's packeted prose issue was addressed by varying the syntax and landing of the marked escalation beats, removing the repeated 'not X' and clipped-fragment scaffolds without changing continuity or chapter architecture.
